evals.prompt: I've just finished setting up the Next.js dark mode with next-themes. Track our progress.
evals.expected_output: Appends a new entry to progressctx/changelog.md noting dark mode completion, and infers/asks for next steps.

evals.prompt: Save the current state; we have a bug in the navbar where the dropdown isn't working on mobile, but otherwise the layout components are done. Next up we need to build the auth pages.
evals.expected_output: Appends an entry highlighting the navbar blocker, accomplished layout components, and upcoming auth requirement.

evals.prompt: Log an update. Finished implementing the Prisma schema.
evals.expected_output: Appends an entry noting the Prisma schema is done.
